examples:
Command Example
!slack-rename-channel channel=my-channel name=your-channel
Human Readable Output
Channel renamed successfully.
10. slack-get-user-details
Get details about a specified user.
Base Command
slack-get-user-details

!slack-rename-channel channel=my-channel name=your-channel
Human Readable Output
Channel renamed successfully.
10. slack-get-user-details
Get details about a specified user.
Base Command
slack-get-user-details
Input

Command Example
!slack-get-user-details user="cool_user"
Context Example
{
"Slack.User": {
"ID": "UXXXXXXXX",
"Name": "Cool User",
"Username": "cool_user",
name: slack-get-user-details

outputs.description: b'The ID of the user.' Slack.User.Username b'The username of the user.'
outputs.name: Slack.User.ID

outputs.description: b'The actual name of the user.' Slack.User.DisplayName b'The display name of the user.'
outputs.name: Slack.User.Name

outputs.description: b'The email address of the user.'
outputs.name: Slack.User.Email
